description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the ruby:2.5.3 Docker image with a postgres:10.1 service, caching the vendor/bundle and node_modules directories. Define variables BUNDLE_PATH, DB_HOST, DB_PASSWORD, and DB_USER. Set up two stages: test and deploy. In the test stage add a test job that runs apt-get update -qy, apt-get install -y nodejs, bundle install --path /cache, bundle exec rake db:create RAILS_ENV=test, and bundle exec rspec. In the deploy stage add a production job that only runs on the master branch, installs the dpl gem with gem install dpl, and deploys to Heroku using dpl --provider=heroku --app=mind-projects with the $HEROKU_PRODUCTION_API_KEY variable.
